description: Catherine Vaughan CB was appointed as Finance Director General for the Department for Work and Pensions ( DWP ) in October 2022. Before joining DWP , Catherine was the Director General and Chief Operating Officer for the Department for International Trade ( DIT ). Catherine began her career with PricewaterhouseCoopers ( PwC ) in public sector audit. She is a qualified accountant with the Chartered Institute of Public Finance and Accountancy ( CIPFA ). Her subsequent roles have included: Director of Finance and Resources for Brighton and Hove City Council Chief Finance Officer for the South Downs National Park Authority Director of Finance and Business Services at HM Land Registry Catherine is a member of the Government Finance Function Leadership Group and leads on SCS talent. She has also been Non-Executive Director on the Board of England Netball.

details.body:
Catherine Vaughan CB was appointed as Finance Director General for the Department for Work and Pensions (DWP) in October 2022.

Before joining DWP, Catherine was the Director General and Chief Operating Officer for the Department for International Trade (DIT).

Catherine began her career with PricewaterhouseCoopers (PwC) in public sector audit. She is a qualified accountant with the Chartered Institute of Public Finance and Accountancy (CIPFA). Her subsequent roles have included:

  • Director of Finance and Resources for Brighton and Hove City Council

  • Chief Finance Officer for the South Downs National Park Authority

  • Director of Finance and Business Services at HM Land Registry

Catherine is a member of the Government Finance Function Leadership Group and leads on SCS talent. She has also been Non-Executive Director on the Board of England Netball.

Catherine Vaughan CB was appointed as Finance Director General for the Department for Work and Pensions (DWP) in October 2022.

Before joining DWP, Catherine was the Director General and Chief Operating Officer for the Department for International Trade (DIT).

Catherine began her career with PricewaterhouseCoopers (PwC) in public sector audit. She is a qualified accountant with the Chartered Institute of Public Finance and Accountancy (CIPFA). Her subsequent roles have included:

  • Director of Finance and Resources for Brighton and Hove City Council

  • Chief Finance Officer for the South Downs National Park Authority

  • Director of Finance and Business Services at HM Land Registry

Catherine is a member of the Government Finance Function Leadership Group and leads on SCS talent. She has also been Non-Executive Director on the Board of England Netball.

The Finance Director General is responsible for:

  • the allocation of resources
  • financial management and control
  • commercial procurement and contract management
  • security and data protection
  • analysis and science
  • risk and resilience

Catherine Vaughan CB was appointed as Finance Director General for the Department for Work and Pensions (DWP) in October 2022.

Before joining DWP, Catherine was the Director General and Chief Operating Officer for the Department for International Trade (DIT).

Catherine began her career with PricewaterhouseCoopers (PwC) in public sector audit. She is a qualified accountant with the Chartered Institute of Public Finance and Accountancy (CIPFA). Her subsequent roles have included:

  • Director of Finance and Resources for Brighton and Hove City Council

  • Chief Finance Officer for the South Downs National Park Authority

  • Director of Finance and Business Services at HM Land Registry

Catherine is a member of the Government Finance Function Leadership Group and leads on SCS talent. She has also been Non-Executive Director on the Board of England Netball.

The Director General (DG) and Chief Operating Officer (COO) for the Department for International Trade (DIT) oversees the finance, digital and technology, human resources and commercial functions.

The COO is member of the Departmental Board and Executive Committee and chairs the Performance, Finance and Risk Committee and the Projects and Change Committee.

details.body:
Catherine Vaughan CB was appointed as Finance Director General for the Department for Work and Pensions (DWP) in October 2022.

Before joining DWP, Catherine was the Director General and Chief Operating Officer for the Department for International Trade (DIT).

Catherine began her career with PricewaterhouseCoopers (PwC) in public sector audit. She is a qualified accountant with the Chartered Institute of Public Finance and Accountancy (CIPFA). Her subsequent roles have included:

  • Director of Finance and Resources for Brighton and Hove City Council

  • Chief Finance Officer for the South Downs National Park Authority

  • Director of Finance and Business Services at HM Land Registry

Catherine is a member of the Government Finance Function Leadership Group and leads on SCS talent. She has also been Non-Executive Director on the Board of England Netball.

The Director of Finance and Business Services is responsible for the financial management of HM Land Registry and compliance with the general requirements of Government Accounting.

They oversee the preparation of our annual report and accounts and are responsible for ensuring the key performance indicator for efficiency is achieved. They provide advice to the Chief Executive and the Portfolio Board on the regularity and propriety of expenditure and also provide advice on commercial contracts.
